response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed geospatial pipelines — key requirements for this role. His DLang and Node.js work shows systems thinking, but the resume shows no evidence of routing tiling, map data optimization, or low-latency geospatial data systems at scale.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) used by real-world NGOs
Demonstrated systems-level programming with DLang and low-latency services
Strong track record of learning new technologies and contributing across stacks
concerns: No demonstrated professional experience with C++ or Rust in production routing or navigation systems
Current role is a career gap; most recent role was short-term and focused on AI-agent tooling, not geospatial pipelines
Lacks explicit experience with routing tile generation, map data freshness, or real-time traffic integration
